name.title: What's your name?
name.subtitle: This will be used to personalize your readings

birth_date.title: When were you born?
birth_date.subtitle: Your birth date determines your Sun sign and more

location.title: Where were you born?
location.subtitle: Your birth location affects house calculations
location.timezone_auto_body: Your timezone will be automatically determined from your birth city's coordinates for accurate planetary calculations.
location.hint: Start typing to search for cities worldwide

birth_time.title: What time were you born?
birth_time.subtitle: This determines your Ascendant and house placements
birth_time.clock_hint: Enter the time as shown on the clock at your birthplace.
birth_time.timezone_hint: We'll use the {{timezone}} timezone for calculations.
birth_time.estimate_hint: Don't know your exact birth time? Enter your best estimate.

life_events.title: Share Your Life Story
life_events.subtitle: Describe significant life events in your own words. This helps us refine your birth time for more accurate readings.
life_events.why_body: Major life events (marriage, career changes, children) correlate with planetary periods. By matching your events to astrological timing, we can validate and refine your birth time.
life_events.textarea_label: Tell us about your life events:
life_events.textarea_placeholder: For example: I got married in 2015, had my first child in 2018, changed careers in 2020...
life_events.min_length_error: Please describe at least one significant life event.
life_events.saved_feedback: Thanks! Your story is saved on this device and will help refine your birth time in a future update.
life_events.skip: Skip - I'll use approximate birth time
examples: I got married in June 2015, had my first child in 2018, and changed careers from engineering to teaching in 2020.
My father passed away when I was 23, I bought my first house at 30, and I relocated from New York to California in 2019.
I've had a stable life - same job for 15 years, married my college sweetheart in 2010, two kids born in 2012 and 2015.

error.title: Connection Issue
error.default_body: Unable to check chart generation status. Your chart may already be ready.
error.reset_hint: Still stuck? Clear the cached engine data and reload for a clean start.
error.still_warming: The on-device engine is still preparing — hang tight, your chart will generate as soon as it's ready.
error.help: If your chart was already generated, you'll see it on the dashboard. Otherwise, try generating again.
